chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Generosity and Munificence

text: 1717 - وَ قَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «إِذَا لَمْ يَكُنْ لِلَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي اَلْعَبْدِ حَاجَةٌ اِبْتَلاَهُ بِالْبُخْلِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1717 - The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"If Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, has no need for a servant, He tests him with miserliness."
